functions.name: MC.Normal
functions.description: Normal distribution. Returns the mean in normal mode; samples during simulation.

functions.name: MC.Triangular
functions.description: Triangular distribution. Returns the mode in normal mode.

functions.name: MC.PERT
functions.description: PERT distribution. Returns the mode in normal mode.

functions.name: MC.Lognormal
functions.description: Lognormal distribution. Returns exp(mu + sigma^2 / 2) in normal mode.

parameters.name: mu
parameters.description: Mean of the underlying normal distribution (mu)

parameters.name: sigma
parameters.description: Std dev of the underlying normal distribution (sigma), must be > 0

functions.name: MC.Uniform
functions.description: Uniform distribution. Returns the midpoint in normal mode.

functions.name: MC.Beta
functions.description: Beta distribution [0,1]. Returns alpha/(alpha+beta) in normal mode.

functions.name: MC.Weibull
functions.description: Weibull distribution. Returns scale * Gamma(1 + 1/shape) in normal mode.

functions.name: MC.Exponential
functions.description: Exponential distribution. Returns 1/rate in normal mode.

functions.name: MC.Poisson
functions.description: Poisson distribution. Returns lambda in normal mode.

functions.name: MC.Gamma
functions.description: Gamma distribution. Returns shape/rate in normal mode.

functions.name: MC.Logistic
functions.description: Logistic distribution. Returns mu in normal mode.

functions.name: MC.GEV
functions.description: Generalized Extreme Value distribution. Returns expected value in normal mode.

functions.name: MC.Binomial
functions.description: Binomial distribution. Returns n*p in normal mode.

parameters.name: p
parameters.description: Probability of success, must be in [0,1]

functions.name: MC.Geometric
functions.description: Geometric distribution. Returns 1/p in normal mode.

parameters.name: p
parameters.description: Probability of success, must be in (0,1]
